nasb.text: And not only this, but we also exult in our tribulations, knowing that tribulation brings about perseverance;

esv.text: Not only that, but we rejoice in our sufferings, knowing that suffering produces endurance,

cnv.text: 不但這樣，我們更以患難為榮；知道患難產生忍耐，

ccb.text: 不但如此，我们在苦难中也欢喜，因为知道苦难使人生忍耐，

csbs.text: 不仅如此，我们也以患难夸耀，因为我们知道患难生出忍耐，
